name: Spaghetti with Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a Dutch oven.
2. Cook and stir onion and garlic in hot oil until onion is tender.
3. Stir in tomato sauce, mushrooms (with liquid), green pepper, parsley, salt, pepper, sugar, basil, and oregano.
4. Bring to a boil; reduce heat.
5. Cover and simmer, stirring occasionally for 1 hour.
6. Stir in red wine; cover and simmer, stirring occasionally for 30 minutes.
7. Uncover and simmer, stirring occasionally for another 30 minutes longer.
8. While the sauce is simmering, prepare the meatballs.
9. Mix all meatball ingredients except oil.
10. Shape into balls using a rounded tablespoon.
11. Heat oil in a 10-inch skillet.
12. Cook meatballs in hot oil until done (about 20 minutes).
13. Drain spaghetti and spoon meatballs onto it; cover with sauce.
14. Serve with grated Parmesan cheese.
